passage:
y = 500(3) 2x

choices.label: A
choices.text: The estimated number of online newsletter subscribers at the end of the first six month peri od was 500.

choices.label: B
choices.text: The estimated number of online newsletter subscribers at the end of J anua r y 1991 was 500.

choices.label: C
choices.text: The estimated number of online newsletter subscribers at the end of J anuary 1992 was 1,500.

choices.label: D
choices.text: The estimated number of online newsletter subscribers at the end of J anuary 1991 was 1, 500.

skill: Linear inequalities in one or two variables
test_name: December 2024 International Form B SAT Math Module 1
passage: When several resistors are connected in series in a circuit, the total resistance of the circuit is the sum of the resistances of these resistors. A certain circuit consists of 5 resistors connected in series, where the resistance of each resistor is positive. This circuit has a total resistance of 90 ohms. The total resistance of 2 resistors in this circuit is 60 ohms. Which inequality best represents all possible values of the resistance x, in ohms, of one of the other 3 resistors in this circuit?

test_name: December 2024 International Form B SAT Math Module 1
passage: A family has money in an account for renting movies online. Each time the family rents a movie, the cost of the rental is withdrawn from the account, and each rental costs the same amount of money. Which of the following represents the amount of money, in dollars, withdrawn from the account each time the family rents a movie?
